name: llm-fusion
description: LLM Fusion — sealed multi-model council for Claude Code. Claude + Codex + Antigravity + Grok answer and build independently, anonymized, then a judge fuses the best (many models in, one fused answer out). Adds /fusion-council (decisions) and /fusion-build (build-off). Requires the claude, codex, agy, and grok CLIs installed + authenticated, and Python 3.11+.
